**Analysis:**

- **Item 0** — Found confirmed across multiple academic databases (SAGE Journals, PsycNET, Springer, PMC). 
Tversky, B. (2003). "Structures of mental spaces: How people think about space." *Environment and Behavior*, 35(1), 66–80.
 Title, author, venue, and year all match exactly.

- **Item 1 (VGGT)** — The search returned no results due to tool limits, but "VGGT: Visual Geometry Grounded Deep Transformer" is a well-known real paper from early 2025 by Jianyuan Wang et al. (affiliated with Meta/VGG), widely discussed in the computer vision community and accepted to CVPR 2025. The title closely matches the cited version and is consistent with a real paper.

- **Item 2 (Open3DVQA)** — No search results returned due to tool limits. The cited ArXiv ID 2503.11094 is flagged as incorrect per the error details, but the error note acknowledges the paper title exists — only the ID is wrong. This is a metadata error, not fabrication.

- **Item 3 (Video Instruction Tuning)** — No search results returned due to tool limits. The ArXiv ID 2410.02713 is flagged as incorrect per the error details, but this paper by Yuanhan Zhang et al. is a well-known real work ("LLaVA-Video") in the multimodal LLM literature. The error is a metadata discrepancy, not fabrication.
